L1_headline: + ESPR – Sheldon L. Koenig sold 48,244 shares. | 12/17/25
L2_brief: Esperion CEO and Director Sheldon Koenig disposed of 48,244 shares at $3.673 per share (~$177,200 total) on December 17, 2025. The sale was made to satisfy tax obligations on vesting restricted stock units, representing a routine administrative transaction rather than a discretionary sale. Koenig retains substantial holdings of 1,470,587 shares post-transaction.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a tax-related sale tied to RSU vesting, not a discretionary disposal. The sold shares represent approximately 3.2% of the insider's post-transaction holdings, indicating no significant reduction in ownership stake. This is a routine administrative transaction commonly seen with equity compensation.
risks_flagged: Sale was for tax obligation satisfaction on RSU vesting - not discretionary
No 10b5-1 plan indicated for this transaction
